ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L) */,
  "size_system" TEXT /* Size system (e.g., US, EU, ASIA) */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement range */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement range */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length range */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement range */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement range */,
  "back_length" TEXT /* Back length measurement range */,
  "arm_hole" TEXT /* Arm hole measurement range */,
  "rise" TEXT /* Rise measurement range */,
  "legOpening" TEXT /* Leg opening measurement range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_size_system FOREIGN KEY ("size_system") REFERENCES size_systems ("system_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the size system (e.g., US, EU, ASIA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size system */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the size system is primarily used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size system was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the size system was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., chest, waist, hip) */,
  "measurement_range" TEXT /* Range of the measurement */,
  "shoulder_width" TEXT /* Shoulder width measurement range */,
  "back_length" TEXT /* Back length measurement range */,
  "arm_hole" TEXT /* Arm hole measurement range */,
  "rise" TEXT /* Rise measurement range */,
  "legOpening" TEXT /* Leg opening measurement range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., shirts, pants) */,
  "available_sizes" TEXT /* List of available sizes for the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is intended (e.g., Men, Women, Unisex) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the product is intended (e.g., Adult, Kids) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the product is expected to be restocked */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the inventory is located */,
  "online_availability" INTEGER /* Whether the product is available online */,
  "in_store_availability" INTEGER /* Whether the product is available in the store */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest measurement */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the customer */,
  "preference" TEXT /* Customer's size preference (e.g., slim, regular, plus) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the purchase was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "price_paid" TEXT /* Price paid for the product */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the purchase was made */,
  "online_purchase" INTEGER /* Whether the purchase was made online */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the purchase was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "recommended_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended size */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the size recommendation (e.g., based on measurements, purchase history) */,
  "confidence_score" TEXT /* Confidence score of the recommendation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_recommended_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store associate, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
